tasks.label: Publish Personal Site
tasks.command: if (-not (Test-Path .git)) { git init }; git config user.name "Neel Mishra"; git config user.email "mishraneel99@gmail.com"; if (-not (git remote | Select-String -Pattern "^origin$")) { git remote add origin https://github.com/neelmishra/neelmishra.github.io.git }; git branch -M main; git add .; git commit -m 'Redesign personal website'; git push -u origin main

tasks.label: Force Publish Personal Site
tasks.command: git fetch origin main; git push --force-with-lease -u origin main

tasks.label: Cleanup And Push
tasks.command: if (Test-Path .vscode/tasks.json) { git rm .vscode/tasks.json; Remove-Item .vscode/tasks.json -Force }; git commit -m 'Remove temporary local task config'; git push

tasks.label: Download Resume And Push Blog
tasks.command: Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://neelmishra.github.io/assets/documents/neel_mishra_resume.pdf' -OutFile 'assets/documents/neel_mishra_resume.pdf'; Copy-Item 'C:/Users/mishr/Downloads/neel_mishra_resume_fancy.pdf' 'assets/documents/neel_mishra_resume_fancy.pdf' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; git add .; git commit -m 'Add blog system with C++ STL series and resume download'; git push origin main
